original: This primitive helmet boasts an airtight locking collar for use with a separate spacesuit. By combining the two together, you should be safe from the vacuum of space.

original: You snap the helmet onto the incomplete spacesuit to make an airtight garment capable of protecting you from the harsh vacuum of space. Good thing you were already wearing it! Now you have a complete spacesuit, and you’re dressed for vacuum!
